title: gelseminum fulgens
intro: Gelseminum fulgens, also known as Yellow Stems or Yellow Gentian, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia and China, belonging to the family Loganiaceae. This plant contains gelsemine, a toxic alkaloid with medicinal properties, which has been used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Gelseminum fulgens include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as asthma, bronchitis, and insomnia. Gelseminum fulgens can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote relaxation, reduce anxiety, and alleviate respiratory issues.
